---
name: Protocol / datastore request
about: Request capture support for a new database or wire protocol
labels: enhancement
---

**Protocol / datastore**
e.g. "Cassandra CQL", "DynamoDB over HTTP", "NATS"

**Default port**


**Wire protocol spec or reference**
Link to the protocol spec or a Wireshark dissector, if one exists.

**Why it matters for incident replay**
Describe the kind of incidents this would help reproduce.

**Are you willing to contribute the implementation?**
[ ] Yes  [ ] No  [ ] Maybe — I can help test
